verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We lift our voices, We lift our hands; We lift our lives up to You, We are an offering.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, use our voices, Lord, use our hands; Lord, use our lives… They are Yours, We are an offering

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All that we have, All that we are, All that we hope to be We give to You, We give to You.
